title: Update AI system prompt to prefer real API execution over link handoffs
goal: AI 시스템 프롬프트를 수정���여 링크 열기보다 실제 API 실행을 우선하도록 한다. 예: 캘린더 일정 추가 시 'Google Calendar 링크 열기'보다 'calendar_helper로 실제 이벤트 생성'을 우선. Gmail 발송 시 'mailto 링크'보다 'MCP/Gmail API로 실제 발송'을 우선.

test_requirements.case: System prompt contains execution priority instruction
test_requirements.expected: prompt includes 'prefer direct API calls over opening links'
prompt mentions: direct API > MCP tool > connector plugin > link handoff

test_requirements.case: System prompt instructs against link-only plans for actionable requests
test_requirements.expected: prompt says 'do not open a link when a helper tool can complete the action directly'

test_requirements.case: System prompt mentions calendar_helper for calendar requests
test_requirements.expected: prompt guides AI to use calendar_helper instead of browser for calendar

test_requirements.case: System prompt mentions Gmail/email tools for email requests
test_requirements.expected: prompt guides AI to use mcp gmail or draft_helper instead of mailto links

constraints: Only modify SYSTEM_PROMPT and PLANNING_CAPABILITIES_PROMPT in agent.py
Do not change function signatures or logic
Do not modify tools, plugins, or router
Tests verify prompt content, not AI behavior (no real AI calls)
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
